column1: Item(id='FC1', text="Free will is the ability to make different choices even if everything leading up to one's choice were exactly the same.", dimension='FC')

Item(id='FC2', text="Free will is the ability to make a choice based on one's beliefs and desires such that, if one had different beliefs or desires, one's choice would have been different as well.", dimension='FC')
Item(id='FC3', text='People could have free will even if scientists discovered all of the laws that govern all human behavior.', dimension='FC')
Item(id='FC4', text="To have free will means that a person's decisions and actions could not be perfectly predicted by someone else no matter how much information they had.", dimension='FC')
Item(id='FC5', text='If it turned out that people lacked non-physical (or immaterial) souls, then they would lack free will.', dimension='FC')
Item(id='FC6', text='To have free will is to be able to cause things to happen in the world without at the same time being caused to make those things happen.', dimension='FC')
Item(id='FC7', text='People have free will as long as they are able to do what they want without being coerced or constrained by other people.', dimension='FC')

Item(id='MC1', text='To be responsible for our present decisions and actions we must also be responsible for all of our prior decisions and actions that led up to the present moment.', dimension='MC')
Item(id='MC2', text='People deserve to be blamed and punished for bad actions only if they acted of their own free will.', dimension='MC')
Item(id='MC3', text='People who harm others deserve to be punished even if punishing them will not produce any positive benefits to either the offender or society.', dimension='MC')
Item(id='MC4', text='People who perform harmful actions ought to be rehabilitated so they no longer pose a threat to society.', dimension='MC')
Item(id='MC5', text='People who perform harmful actions ought to be punished so that other potential offenders are deterred from committing similar harmful actions.', dimension='MC')
Item(id='MC6', text='People could be morally responsible even if scientists discovered all of the laws that govern human behavior.', dimension='MC')
Item(id='MC7', text='If it turned out that people lacked non-physical (or immaterial) souls, then they would lack moral responsibility.', dimension='MC')
